content: X01 checkout table: Bogey numbers (impossible in 3 darts): 159, 162, 163, 165, 166, 168, 169. Max checkout 170 (T20 T20 Bull). Key routes: 170=T20,T20,Bull; 167=T20,T19,Bull; 164=T19,T19,Bull; 160=T20,T20,D20; 158=T20,T20,D19; 140=T20,T20,D10; 100=T20,D20; 50=D-Bull; 40=D20. Professional style: T20-oriented setups, prefer leaving D16/D20/D18 (even doubles give halving fallback). Single Out: any finish <= 180 that reaches 0. Double Out: final dart must be a double or Bull(50). Outer bull (25) is NOT a valid double-out finish.
